responsibilities: Design and build generative AI products that produce text, image, audio, or video content for end users
Fine-tune diffusion and language models using LoRA and other parameter-efficient techniques on domain-specific data
Develop pipelines that combine generative models with retrieval systems to ground outputs in factual data
Implement content safety, moderation, and filtering systems to ensure generated outputs meet quality and policy standards
Optimize generative model inference for latency and GPU cost across high-throughput production workloads
Collaborate with product and design teams to translate creative requirements into generative AI capabilities
Curate and prepare training and fine-tuning datasets, including synthetic data generation for underrepresented cases
Evaluate generative outputs using automated metrics and human-in-the-loop review processes for quality assurance
Prototype and ship new generative AI features such as image editing, style transfer, or conversational agents
Stay current with rapidly evolving generative AI research and incorporate state-of-the-art techniques into production
